title: Pifco White Essentials Kettle
seller_info_text: Sold by Amazon Resale and Fulfilled by Amazon.
features: Compact and Portable White Kettle: This white kettle is perfect for small spaces and travel. Its 1.7L capacity and cordless design make it ideal for any small kitchen.

Affordable Electric Kettle for Quick Boiling: This cheap kettle offers fast boiling with its powerful 2200W element. Perfect for daily use, this basic kettle is a great addition to any kitchen or travel setup.
Cordless Electric Kettle for Easy Use: The cordless kettle design with a 360-degree swivel base provides convenience, making this electric kettle easy to handle and store in small kitchens or dorms.

Safe and Reliable Kettle with Boil-Dry Protection: This electric kettle includes boil-dry protection to prevent overheating, making it a safe and reliable choice for those seeking kettles electric for home or travel.
Perfect Travel Kettle for Small Kitchens: With its compact size and lightweight design, this small kettle is perfect for travel and small kitchens, offering fast boiling and convenience.
description: Product Description About PIFCO From the first oil-filled heaters to developments in lighting and domestic appliances, PIFCO have been experts in electricals for over 100 years. PIFCO is a household name, trusted by millions to provide cleaning, heating, and lighting solutions. PIFCO products have a place in the heart and history of UK domestic appliances. PIFCO 1.7L White Kettle The PIFCO White 1.7L Kettle is a compact, affordable electric kettle for fast boiling and everyday use. With 2200W power and 1.7L water capacity, it quickly heats water for tea, coffee, or cooking. Featuring boil-dry protection, a cordless design, and a cool-touch handle, it’s safe and easy to use. Perfect for small kitchens and travel, this white kettle is a reliable addition to your home appliances. 1.7L Capacity: Ideal for families or frequent tea and coffee drinkers. Cordless Design: Compact and portable, perfect for small kitchens and travel. Boil-Dry Protection: Automatically shuts off when water is too low for added safety. Affordable and Reliable: A cheap kettle that doesn't compromise on quality, perfect for everyday use. Fast Boiling with 1.7L Capacity The PIFCO 2200W kettle brings water to a boil in minutes, saving you time when you need it most. With a 1.7L water capacity, this electric kettle can make multiple cups of tea, coffee, or soup at once, making it the ideal home kettle for families, small kitchens, or offices. Stylish and Easy to Use With its sleek and modern white kettle design, the PIFCO White 1.7L Kettle complements any kitchen decor. The easy-to-use kettle features a water level gauge for accurate filling, ensuring you boil the exact amount of water you need. The cordless kettle design allows for easy pouring and serving, making it a versatile and efficient kitchen appliance. Compact and Portable Design Perfect for small kitchens, dorm rooms, or as a travel kettle, the PIFCO 1.7L electric kettle is compact and portable, easily fitting on your kitchen counter or packed for a trip. The cordless kettle design with a 360-degree swivel base makes it easy to use and store, providing hassle-free operation with minimal space required. Whether brewing tea or boiling water for cooking, this kettle electric is both practical and space-saving.
